promptTemplate: {{glyph_set}} glyph cascade, {{density}} columns, {{drop_speed}} fall, {{trail_length}} trails, {{color_mode}} tint

tags.label: GenerativeArtGallery — artwork5 (Matrix Rain)
tags.description: Adapted from the falling glyph cascade sketch. Columns of characters fall at randomised speeds with brightness fade along the trail — head glyph is near-white, tail fades to darkness. Supports katakana, Latin, math/unicode symbols, or a mixed pool. Columns reinitialise when density changes. Head character refreshes every 3 frames for flicker.
